git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Address PR review feedback on AI generate flow

- renderPrompt: replaceAll so multiple placeholder instances are substituted
- GenerateAIModal: drop focus:outline-none for keyboard a11y on the textarea
- Workouts: surface saveProgram failure via importMessage instead of swallowing
EOF
)" && git push 2>&1 | tail -10

content.text: Now I'll reply to each review comment.

input.command: gh api repos/gunk-dev/flux/pulls/86/comments/3327046817/replies -f body='Switched to `replaceAll` in `renderPrompt` so multiple instances of any placeholder get substituted, matching the suggestion.'
gh api repos/gunk-dev/flux/pulls/86/comments/3327046831/replies -f body='Removed `focus:outline-none` from the textarea so the default focus ring renders for keyboard users.'

gh api repos/gunk-dev/flux/pulls/86/comments/3327046835/replies -f body='`saveProgram` failure now surfaces through `setImportMessage` with the underlying error, reusing the existing dismissible banner instead of being swallowed.'

content.text:
All three review comments addressed and replied to. Summary of changes pushed in commit `bb8747d`:

- **programGenCore.ts**: `replace` → `replaceAll` for all three template placeholders.
- **GenerateAIModal.tsx**: removed `focus:outline-none` from the textarea so the keyboard focus ring renders.
- **Workouts/index.tsx**: `saveProgram` failure now surfaces via `setImportMessage` with the underlying error message instead of being silently swallowed.

Build passes; all 53 tests pass.

result:
All three review comments addressed and replied to. Summary of changes pushed in commit `bb8747d`:

- **programGenCore.ts**: `replace` → `replaceAll` for all three template placeholders.
- **GenerateAIModal.tsx**: removed `focus:outline-none` from the textarea so the keyboard focus ring renders.
- **Workouts/index.tsx**: `saveProgram` failure now surfaces via `setImportMessage` with the underlying error message instead of being silently swallowed.

Build passes; all 53 tests pass.
